entities.description: As a subsection of '3.1电气特性', this section provides an overview of the power consumption testing procedures and results for the SOM-TL3588 industrial core board.
Refers to the process of measuring and analyzing the power consumption of the SOM-TL3588 industrial core board, as detailed in section 3.2.

relations.description: The concept of '功耗测试' is the primary topic of section 3.2.
